description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image and a VERSION variable. Define a single build stage and a build job that runs in this stage. In the before_script run `rm -rf dist/`, `apt-get update -y`, `apt-get install -y gettext`, and `envsubst < package.json.template > package.json`. In the script run `cp defaults/* .`, `npm install`, and `mv semantic/dist/ dist/`. Publish the directories and files `dist/`, `package.json`, `semantic.json`, and `theme.config` as job artifacts. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
